title: Deva, Hunedoara — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Deva is a city in Hunedoara with a population of 61,123. A city in Transylvania dominated by the ruins of the Deva Fortress atop a volcanic hill, and a gateway to the stunning Corvin Castle in nearby Hunedoara.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
